name: Shell Company Ring
description: Circular ownership of shell companies for layering illicit funds
gsql_query: MATCH path=(c1:Company)-[:OWNS*1..{max_hops}]->(c2:Company) WHERE c1 <> c2 RETURN path
red_flags: High transaction volume but low revenue
remediation: Trace beneficial ownership to ultimate beneficial owner
Request articles of incorporation and operational evidence
Enhanced monitoring on all linked accounts
